title: Watch: AZ Republican Mayor endorses Harris, rebukes Trump at DNC
shortDescription: The Republican mayor of Mesa, Arizona John Giles endorsed Kamala Harris during the DNC in Chicago Tuesday. Watch the speech

title: DNC 2024 roll call vote: What to know about the process
shortDescription: The Democratic National Convention hosted a celebratory roll call vote. Here is why California and Minnesota initially passed their votes.

title: Rhode Island's calamari missing from 2024 DNC roll call vote
shortDescription: The Rhode Island vote at the 2024 DNC was missing a star from the last convention: calamari

title: Rick Scott, Debbie Mucarsel-Powell win, set up Senate showdown
shortDescription: Republican Sen. Rick Scott will face Democratic former Rep. Debbie Mucarsel-Powell after each won their primary Tuesday.
